title: Sidebar node context menu component with click-outside and keyboard handling
purpose: Provides a floating context menu for sidebar tree nodes that closes when clicking outside or pressing Escape, and handles action execution.
module_context: Exports a React functional component named SidebarNodeContextMenu that accepts position, actions, and callback props to render a customizable context menu with proper event handling.

steps.content: Initialize a ref to track the menu DOM element.
Set up event listeners for mouse clicks and keyboard input to close the menu when clicking outside or pressing Escape.
Clean up event listeners when the component unmounts.
Render the menu container with absolute positioning based on provided coordinates.
Map over the provided actions to render menu items with appropriate styling and behavior.
Insert separators between menu items as specified by action properties.
Attach click handlers to menu items that invoke the action callback and close the menu.
Check if the clicked target is outside the menu element.
IF the click is outside, invoke the close callback to hide the menu.
Listen for keyboard events to detect Escape key presses.
IF Escape is pressed, invoke the close callback to hide the menu.
